codeReview.summary: Re-review after fix attempt. The blocking issues from the prior review are STILL PERSISTING. Line 107 ExtractionConfig::default() still sets store_path to '.skills' instead of '.swell/skills/'. Line 139 still has #[allow(dead_code)] attribute on TrajectoryAnalyzer and its store field is still never used for any database operations.

issues.description: STILL PERSISTS: ExtractionConfig::default() sets store_path to '.skills' but should be '.swell/skills/' per AGENTS.md user-extensibility requirements. No change was made to this line.

STILL PERSISTS: TrajectoryAnalyzer still has #[allow(dead_code)] attribute. The store field is defined but never used - the analyzer's methods only process the input trajectory in memory without any database queries. The #[allow(dead_code)] remains unjustified.

summary: This is a re-run review. The prior blocking issues are STILL PERSISTING: (1) ExtractionConfig::default() store_path remains '.skills' instead of '.swell/skills/', (2) TrajectoryAnalyzer still has #[allow(dead_code)] and unused store field. No code changes were made to address these issues.
